z=M(y)local J=function(...)return P(b,{...},y,z)end return J end,function(b,y)local z=M(y)local J=function(J,h,a,V)return P(b,{J;h,a,V},y,z)end return J end,function()f=(-437684+437685)+f S[f]=476894+-476893 return f end return(m(6082924-(-570225),{}))(z(v))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[y(-9771+9479)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
